title: Lepro E14 LED Light Bulb, LED Candle Bulbs Small Screw, 4W 470lm, 40W Equivalent SES E14 Bulb Vintage, Warm White 2700K C35 Light Bulbs, 360° Beam Angle, Clear Filament, Non-dimmable, Pack of 6
features: Clear Filament Design - Made of premium quality glass, these good-looking bulbs add a vintage or decorative touch to any space, providing a charming and retro aesthetic.

Energy-Efficient E14 Bulb - This 4W LED candle bulb is equivalent to 40W traditional bulb, giving you the same brightness 470lm while saving 90% on your electricity bill. And it has a long lifespan of up to 15,000 hours. Energy Efficient Class "E" (equals to old " A++" rating).
Easy to Fit & Use - The standard E14 small edison screw bulb is suitable for various fixtures including chandeliers, ceiling fans, wall sconces, pendant lights, and table lamp.

Create a Cozy Atmosphere - No flickering, CRI over 80, and the warm white 2700K light emitted by these candle light bulbs creates a relaxing and inviting ambiance, perfect for unwinding or entertaining.
What You will Get - Pack of 6 E14 LED candle bulb warm white, kindly note that they are not dimmable, please don't use them with a dimmer.

And the long lifespan will reduce the re-lamp frequency and costs. Wide Beam Angle 360° diffused and uniform lighting, which is perfect for residential and commercial lighting, light up your living room, bedroom, kitchen, dining room, garage, bathroom, study or office. Soft on Your Eyes Provides 470 lumens of beautiful warm white (2700 kelvin) lighting. No buzzing, humming or flickers at all. CRI is over 80, which means more vivid and natural light. Wide Applications Lepro E14 LED Light Bulb Candle Filament C35 Instant on Without Delay These bulbs will go onto full brightness less than 0.5 seconds, no need to wait for warming up the lamp. Easy Installation Candle shape with standard candelabra edison screw E14 base fits perfectly in those smaller lighting fixtures throughout your home. Note According to the new energy efficiency rating, this bulb is rated E, previous it was A++. There is nothing changed of its energy efficiency, just different rating rules. Needn't worry about its electricity cost. Specifications 4W=40W, 470lm E14 Small Edison Screw AC 220-240V 360° Beam Angle Warm White 2700K Non-dimmable, CRI > 80 ø35 x 96 mm Pack of 6
